title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Adani Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Adani Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Adani Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Adani Enterprises:
Adani Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adani Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
